label: Diagnose Failure
description: Reproduce → isolate → explain → fix → verify a failing system.
success_criteria: Root cause identified, fix applied, reproduction case now passes.
author: system

states.name: reproduce
states.label: Reproduce
states.guidance: Get the failure to happen on demand. Write working_state['repro_steps'] (>= 3 items) and working_state['observed_error'] (>= 40 chars).

states.name: isolate
states.label: Isolate
states.guidance: Narrow the failure to one component / file / function. Write working_state['hypothesized_cause'] (>= 60 chars) and list working_state['suspect_files'] (>= 1 item).

states.name: explain
states.label: Explain
states.guidance: Confirm the mechanism — trace the code path that produces the error. Write working_state['root_cause'] (>= 100 chars) describing exactly why it fails.

states.name: fix
states.label: Fix
states.guidance: Apply the minimal change that addresses the root cause. Record working_state['fix_summary'] (>= 60 chars) and working_state['files_changed'] (>= 1 item).

states.name: verify_fix
states.label: Verify Fix
states.guidance: Run the reproduction from state 1 again. Record working_state['post_fix_result'] (>= 40 chars). If still failing, go back to explain.
